<!-- Chart CH-DEV-02 DUMBBELL, role-based (themeable) -->

## DUMBBELL chart (CH-DEV-02)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-DEV-02",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "deviation",
    "change-over-time",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "two dots + connector per category: before and after",
  "data_required": "categories with a value at two moments; the movement is the message",
  "family": "DEV",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-05 (few categories, slope reads better)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "more than 2 time points",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- before/after per category: backlog W24 vs W28, score last year vs now
- spotting the row that moved against the trend

Do NOT use when:
- more than two moments (CH-TIM-01)
- two unrelated measures (CH-DST-02)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the mover with numbers",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first label",
  "series_labels": "[before_name, after_name]",
  "categories": "array of {label, values: [before, after], highlight?}"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,

    },

    },

      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 208,
      "right": 800,
      "top": 150
    },
    "row_height": 30,
    "row_gap": 22,
    "category_label": {
      "size": 13,
      "offset": 16
    },
    "value_label": {
      "size": 12,
      "offset": 12
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "note": "shared scale; connector shows the travel"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- before = dot_a muted, after = dot_b primary; the connector is the story
- labels state both values: '52 > 63'
- highlight the row moving against the trend

### Never do this
- arrows instead of connectors (double-encodes direction)
- legends
- sorting that hides the counter-mover

### QA before delivering
- [ ] both values labeled per row
- [ ] series labeled on first row
- [ ] highlight <= 1
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| dot_a | muted |
| dot_b | primary |
| connector | hairline |
| category_label | body |
| value_label | ink |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
